questions.question: What is the primary function of Artificial Intelligence?

options.B: To make decisions based on data analysis

questions.explanation: AI is used to automate tasks that are repetitive and can be done by machines quickly and accurately.

questions.question: What type of learning requires labeled training data?
questions.explanation: Supervised learning requires labeled training data to learn and make predictions or decisions.

questions.question: What is the term for a machine's ability to improve its performance on a task over time?
questions.explanation: Machine learning enables machines to improve their performance on a task over time through experience and learning.

questions.question: Which AI concept involves an agent learning through trial and error to maximize a reward?
questions.explanation: Reinforcement learning involves an agent learning through trial and error to maximize a reward signal.

questions.question: What type of neural network is a multilayer perceptron?
questions.explanation: A multilayer perceptron is a type of feedforward neural network that consists of multiple layers of interconnected nodes.

questions.question: What is the term for a neural network that can modify its connections and weights?
questions.explanation: A traditional feedforward neural network (ANN) can modify its connections and weights.

questions.question: What type of machine learning algorithm is used for image classification?
questions.explanation: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are commonly used for image classification tasks due to their ability to handle spatial hierarchies of features.

questions.question: Which AI concept involves creating a model that can learn to classify inputs into predefined categories?
questions.explanation: Classification involves creating a model that can learn to classify inputs into predefined categories to predict outcomes.

questions.question: What type of AI system can adapt to new situations and tasks without extensive retraining?
questions.explanation: Narrow or weak AI systems can adapt to new situations and tasks without extensive retraining.

questions.question: What neural network type is capable of processing sequential data such as speech or text?
questions.explanation: Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are capable of processing sequential data such as speech or text.

questions.question: Which type of neural network is commonly used for generating new, synthetic data?
questions.explanation: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are commonly used for generating new, synthetic data.

questions.question: What type of machine learning problem involves predicting a continuous target variable?
questions.explanation: Regression involves predicting a continuous target variable.

questions.question: Which type of reinforcement learning involves a critic network that predicts the expected return at each state?
questions.explanation: Actor-critic algorithms involve a critic network that predicts the expected return at each state.

questions.question: What is the term for the phenomenon where a model becomes overly confident in its predictions due to memorization of patterns?
questions.explanation: Overfitting occurs when a model becomes overly confident in its predictions due to memorization of patterns.

questions.question: Which type of neural network is commonly used for image generation and style transfer?
questions.explanation: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are commonly used for image generation and style transfer.

questions.question: What type of machine learning problem involves clustering similar data points into groups?
questions.explanation: Clustering involves grouping similar data points into clusters.

questions.question: Which type of neural network is capable of handling multiple inputs and outputs simultaneously?
questions.explanation: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are capable of handling multiple inputs and outputs simultaneously.

questions.question: What type of machine learning algorithm is used for dimensionality reduction in high-dimensional data?
questions.explanation: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is commonly used for dimensionality reduction in high-dimensional data.

questions.question: Which type of reinforcement learning involves learning to predict the expected return at each state?
